'''kohahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:updatable|updatable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:updatable|updatable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kohahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohahithi|kohahithi]] || [[word:kohahiji|kohahiji]] || [[word:kohahishi|kohahishi]] || [[word:kohahiki|kohahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohahuthuthu|kohahuthuthu]] || [[word:kohahujuju|kohahujuju]] || [[word:kohahushushu|kohahushushu]] || [[word:kohahukuku|kohahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohahuthu|kohahuthu]] || [[word:kohahuju|kohahuju]] || [[word:kohahushu|kohahushu]] || [[word:kohahuku|kohahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohahufthuf|kohahufthuf]] || [[word:kohahufjuf|kohahufjuf]] || [[word:kohahufshuf|kohahufshuf]] || [[word:kohahufkuf|kohahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohahethe|kohahethe]] || [[word:kohaheje|kohaheje]] || [[word:kohaheshe|kohaheshe]] || [[word:kohaheke|kohaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohahothotho|kohahothotho]] || [[word:kohahojojo|kohahojojo]] || [[word:kohahoshosho|kohahoshosho]] || [[word:kohahokoko|kohahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohahotho|kohahotho]] || [[word:kohahojo|kohahojo]] || [[word:kohahosho|kohahosho]] || [[word:kohahoko|kohahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohahofthof|kohahofthof]] || [[word:kohahofjof|kohahofjof]] || [[word:kohahofshof|kohahofshof]] || [[word:kohahofkof|kohahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfthÃŸf|kohahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfjÃŸf|kohahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfshÃŸf|kohahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfkÃŸf|kohahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kohahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kohahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kohahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kohahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfthÃŸf|kohahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfjÃŸf|kohahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfshÃŸf|kohahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfkÃŸf|kohahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfthÃŸf|kohahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfjÃŸf|kohahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfshÃŸf|kohahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kohahÃŸfkÃŸf|kohahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kohahÃḊthÃḊ|kohahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kohahÃḊjÃḊ|kohahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kohahÃḊshÃḊ|kohahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kohahÃḊkÃḊ|kohahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kohahathatha|kohahathatha]] || [[word:kohahajaja|kohahajaja]] || [[word:kohahashasha|kohahashasha]] || [[word:kohahakaka|kohahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kohahatha|kohahatha]] || [[word:kohahaja|kohahaja]] || [[word:kohahasha|kohahasha]] || [[word:kohahaka|kohahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kohahafthaf|kohahafthaf]] || [[word:kohahafjaf|kohahafjaf]] || [[word:kohahafshaf|kohahafshaf]] || [[word:kohahafkaf|kohahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kohahasha|kohahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohahshÃḋsha|kohahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohahrosha|kohahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohahmusha|kohahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohahyasha|kohahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohahnkshÃḋsha|gokohahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohahnkrosha|gokohahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohahnkmusha|gokohahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohahnkyasha|gokohahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kohahahasha|kohahahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohahahshÃḋsha|kohahahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohahahrosha|kohahahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohahahmusha|kohahahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohahahyasha|kohahahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohahahnkshÃḋsha|gokohahahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohahahnkrosha|gokohahahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohahahnkmusha|gokohahahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohahahnkyasha|gokohahahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kehÃḊhasha|kehÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kehÃḊhshÃḋsha|kehÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kehÃḊhrosha|kehÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kehÃḊhmusha|kehÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kehÃḊhyasha|kehÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokehÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|gokehÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokehÃḊhnkrosha|gokehÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokehÃḊhnkmusha|gokehÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokehÃḊhnkyasha|gokehÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kohfahasha|kohfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kohfahshÃḋsha|kohfahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kohfahrosha|kohfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kohfahmusha|kohfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kohfahyasha|kohfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokohfahnkshÃḋsha|gokohfahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokohfahnkrosha|gokohfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokohfahnkmusha|gokohfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokohfahnkyasha|gokohfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
